title: On the Relation Between Technical and Environmental Sustainability - A Systematic Literature Review
author: Beneyto Gomez Polo, Jesus
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
On the Relation Between Technical and Environmental Sustainability - A Systematic Literature Review (REPLICATION PACKAGE) 
 
 The file  SLR Protocol  contains the review protocol followed by this SLR. 
 The files  ACM.xlsx ,  ScienceDirect.xlsx , and  IEEE.xlsx  contain the primary studies selected from the respective databases after running the search query. 
 The file  Study Selection.xlsx  contains the primary studies selected at each snowballing iteration. 
 The file  Data Extraction Form.xlsx  contains the data that was extracted from each primary study as defined in the review protocol 
 The file  FINAL Constant Comparison.xlsx  contains the constant comparison process performed on the extracted data. 
 The file  FINAL RQ1.2 TOOLS.xlsx  contains all the tools that were extracted from the primary studies.
